title: NSSF, SHIF, and NITA payroll deductions Kenya — a framing guide (no rates)
excerpt: A framing guide to NSSF, SHIF, and NITA payroll deductions in Kenya — what each is for, where it sits in the cycle, scope, and what good payroll software does about rule maintenance. Deliberately rate-free; statutory-reviewer sign-off required.
